title: TraceEvent Schema
description: A CTL record representing a single decision or observation during an active Project Lumina session.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for this record (UUID v4).

prev_record_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the previous record's canonical JSON, or 'genesis' for the first record.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this event occurred.

session_id.description: UUID of the session this event belongs to.

actor_id.description: Pseudonymous identifier of the actor (student, orchestrator, domain authority).

invariant_id.description: ID of the invariant checked (for invariant_check events).

standing_order_id.description: ID of the standing order applied (for standing_order_applied events).

standing_order_attempt.description: Which attempt number this is for the standing order (1-indexed).

decision.description: Structured description of the orchestrator's decision. No transcript content.

evidence_summary.description: Structured evidence summary for this turn. No raw text or transcript content.

state_snapshot_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the compressed state after this event.

domain_pack_id.description: Domain pack active during this event.

domain_pack_version.description: Version of the domain pack active during this event.

metadata.description: Additional structured metadata. Must not contain PII or transcript content.
